s: Private Muslim app for prayer, tasbih, study, and gentle reminders
d:
Khushu is a private Muslim app built to support worship without ads, trackers, or subscriptions.

It brings together prayer times, guided prayer, tasbih, Quran, hadith, and focused study tools in one calm, modern experience.

What Khushu offers

  • Home screen with prayer times, current prayer state, sun progress, and Islamic month events
  • Guided prayer flow for users who want a clean rakat-by-rakat companion
  • Tasbih collections with immersive counters and customizable bead styles
  • Quran reading with Arabic text, translations, tafsir catalogs, and audio support
  • Hadith and study sections designed for quiet reading and reflection
  • Prayer notifications, pre-prayer reminders, and optional extra timings like sunrise and midnight

Built with care

  • No ads
  • No analytics
  • No account required
  • Local-first design where possible
  • Focused visual design for worship instead of social noise

Khushu is still early, but the intention is clear: make a beautiful, respectful tool that helps Muslims return to prayer, dhikr, and study with more presence.
